chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-96 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 12.05.2025 Mr. Shawak Rathore, D.P.G. along with ASI Allah Dad PS Waleed, Larkana. -.-.-. On the last date of hearing notices were issued to the Respondents. In compliance of the notices ASI Allah Dad on behalf of Respondent No.2 SHO PS Waleed is present in person and states that they have not caused any harassment to the petitioners. In such circumstances, this matter is disposed of with clear directions to all the Respondents not to harass the present petitioners and the legal protection may be provided to them and their family members as and when required. Matter stands disposed off in above terms. J U D G E Ali Haider
